records.chapter: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5043 - In the narration of Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Abu Ayyub, who heard Ibn Bukayr narrating from one of the Imams (peace be upon them), it is reported:
"Whoever commits fornication with a close relative (one prohibited in marriage) until intercourse occurs, he is to be struck with the sword in a blow that takes from him whatever it takes.
And if she consented to him, she is to be struck with the sword in a blow that takes from her whatever it takes."
It was asked: "And who carries out the punishment upon them when they have no accuser?"
Imam (as) replied: "That is up to the Imam when the case is presented to him."
records.arabicText:
5043 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ اِبْنَ بُكَيْرٍ يَرْوِي عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "مَنْ زَنَى بِذَاتِ مَحْرَمٍ حَتَّى يُوَاقِعَهَا ضُرِبَ ضَرْبَةً بِالسَّيْفِ أَخَذَتْ مِنْهُ مَا أَخَذَتْ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَابَعَتْهُ ضُرِبَتْ ضَرْبَةً بِالسَّيْفِ أَخَذَتْ مِنْهَا مَا أَخَذَتْ"
قِيلَ وَ مَنْ يَضْرِبُهُمَا وَ لَيْسَ لَهُمَا خَصْمٌ قَالَ "ذَلِكَ إِلَى اَلْإِمَامِ إِذَا رُفِعَا إِلَيْهِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5043 - In the narration of Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Abu Ayyub, who heard Ibn Bukayr narrating from one of the Imams (peace be upon them), it is reported:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Whoever commits fornication with a close relative (one prohibited in marriage) until intercourse occurs, he is to be struck with the sword in a blow that takes from him whatever it takes.
And if she consented to him, she is to be struck with the sword in a blow that takes from her whatever it takes."
It was asked: "And who carries out the punishment upon them when they have no accuser?"
Imam (as) replied: "That is up to the Imam when the case is presented to him."

records.chapter: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5044 - In the narration of Jamil from Abu Abdullah (as), he said: "His neck is to be struck,"
Or Imam (as) said: "His throat."
records.arabicText: 5044 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ جَمِيلٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "يُضْرَبُ عُنُقُهُ" أَوْ قَالَ "رَقَبَتُهُ".

records.chapter: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5045 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it was reported to Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) that a man had committed fornication with his father's wife, so Imam (as) ordered him to be stoned, even though he was not married (non-muhṣan).
records.arabicText: 5045 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ أَنَّهُ رُفِعَ إِلَى عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "رَجُلٌ وَقَعَ عَلَى اِمْرَأَةِ أَبِيهِ فَرَجَمَهُ وَ كَانَ غَيْرَ مُحْصَنٍ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5045 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it was reported to Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) that
records.thaqalaynMatn: a man had committed fornication with his father's wife, so Imam (as) ordered him to be stoned, even though he was not married (non-muhṣan).

records.chapter: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5046 - In the narration reported by Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Ali ibn Riʾab from Abu Ubaydah from Abu Jafar (as), regarding a man upon whom a legal punishment (hadd) was due but he was not punished until he became mentally disturbed.
Imam (as) said: "If he had confessed to the hadd upon himself while he was sound in mind and free from any mental illness, then the hadd must be carried out on him regardless of his current state."
records.arabicText: 5046 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ وَجَبَ عَلَيْهِ حَدٌّ فَلَمْ يُضْرَبْ حَتَّى خُولِطَ فَقَالَ "إِنْ كَانَ أَوْجَبَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ اَلْحَدَّ وَ هُوَ صَحِيحٌ لاَ عِلَّةَ بِهِ مِنْ ذَهَابِ عَقْلٍ أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلْحَدُّ كَائِناً مَا كَانَ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5046 - In the narration reported by Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Ali ibn Riʾab from Abu Ubaydah from Abu Jafar (as), regarding a man upon whom a legal punishment (hadd) was due but he was not punished until he became mentally disturbed.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "If he had confessed to the hadd upon himself while he was sound in mind and free from any mental illness, then the hadd must be carried out on him regardless of his current state."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Sodomy and Tribadism
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5047 - In the narration reported by Hammad ibn Uthman from Abu Abdullah (as), he said: I asked Imam (as) about a man who approached another man (committing sodomy).
Imam (as) replied: "If the perpetrator was married (muhṣan), then his punishment is execution, and if he was not married, then the legal punishment (hadd) applies to him."
I then asked: "What about the one who was approached?"
Imam (as) replied: "He must be executed in all cases, whether he was married or unmarried."
records.arabicText: 5047 - رَوَى حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ أَتَى رَجُلاً قَالَ "إِنْ كَانَ مُحْصَناً فَعَلَيْهِ اَلْقَتْلُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُحْصَناً فَعَلَيْهِ اَلْحَدُّ" قُلْتُ فَمَا عَلَى اَلْمُؤْتَى بِهِ قَالَ "عَلَيْهِ اَلْقَتْلُ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ مُحْصَناً كَانَ أَوْ غَيْرَ مُحْصَنٍ".
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.5047 - In the narration reported by Hammad ibn Uthman from Abu Abdullah (as), he said: I asked Imam (as) about a man who approached another man (committing sodomy).
Imam (as) replied:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"If the perpetrator was married (muhṣan), then his punishment is execution, and if he was not married, then the legal punishment (hadd) applies to him."
I then asked: "What about the one who was approached?"
Imam (as) replied: "He must be executed in all cases, whether he was married or unmarried."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Sodomy and Tribadism
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5048 - In the narration of Hisham and Hafṣ ibn Al-Bukhturi, it is reported that a group of women entered upon Abu Abdullah (as), and one of the women asked him about lesbianism (Al-sahaq).
Imam (as) replied: "Its punishment is the same as that of the adulterer (Al-zani)."
A woman then said: "But Allah (swt) has not mentioned that in the Qur'an."
Imam (as) replied: "Indeed, He (swt) has."
She asked: "Where is it mentioned?"
Imam (as) said: "They are the people of Al-Rass (Ashab Al-Rass)."
records.arabicText: 5048 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ هِشَامٍ وَ حَفْصِ بْنِ اَلْبَخْتَرِيِّ : أَنَّهُ دَخَلَ نِسْوَةٌ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَسَأَلَتْهُ اِمْرَأَةٌ مِنْهُنَّ عَنِ اَلسَّحْقِ فَقَالَ "حَدُّهَا حَدُّ اَلزَّانِي" فَقَالَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ مَا ذَكَرَ اَللَّهُ ذَلِكَ فِي اَلْقُرْآنِ فَقَالَ "بَلَى" فَقَالَتْ أَيْنَ هُوَ قَالَ "هُنَّ أَصْحَابُ اَلرَّسِّ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5048 - In the narration of Hisham and Hafṣ ibn Al-Bukhturi, it is reported that a group of women entered upon Abu Abdullah (as), and one of the women asked him about lesbianism (Al-sahaq).
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) replied: "Its punishment is the same as that of the adulterer (Al-zani)."
A woman then said: "But Allah (swt) has not mentioned that in the Qur'an."
Imam (as) replied: "Indeed, He (swt) has."
She asked: "Where is it mentioned?"
Imam (as) said: "They are the people of Al-Rass (Ashab Al-Rass)."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Sodomy and Tribadism
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5049 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), it is reported that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said: "If it were appropriate for anyone to be stoned twice, it would be the one who commits sodomy (Al-Luti)."
records.arabicText: 5049 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "لَوْ كَانَ يَنْبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ أَنْ يُرْجَمَ مَرَّتَيْنِ لَرُجِمَ اَللُّوطِيُّ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5049 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), it is reported that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If it were appropriate for anyone to be stoned twice, it would be the one who commits sodomy (Al-Luti)."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Sodomy and Tribadism
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5050 - Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Hashim Al-Bajali narrated from Abu Khadijah:
"It is not appropriate for two women to sleep under the same blanket unless there is a barrier between them. If they do so, they should be prohibited from it, and if they are found again after being warned in the same blanket, each of them should be lashed the prescribed punishment.
If they are found a third time under the same blanket, they should be punished with the prescribed punishment,
If they are found a fourth time under the same blanket, they should be executed.
And if a man approaches his wife and she carries his semen and uses it to commit lesbian acts with her maid, resulting in pregnancy, the wife should be stoned, the maid should be lashed, and the child should be attributed to the father."
records.arabicText: 5050 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ اَلْبَجَلِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي خَدِيجَةَ قَالَ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي لاِمْرَأَتَيْنِ أَنْ تَنَامَا فِي لِحَافٍ وَاحِدٍ إِلاَّ وَ بَيْنَهُمَا حَاجِزٌ فَإِنْ فَعَلَتَا نُهِيَتَا عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَإِنْ وَجَدُوهُمَا بَعْدَ اَلنَّهْيِ فِي لِحَافٍ وَاحِدٍ جُلِدَتَا كُلُّ وَاحِدَةٍ مِنْهُمَا حَدّاً حَدّاً وَ إِنْ وُجِدَتَا اَلثَّالِثَةَ فِي لِحَافٍ حُدَّتَا فَإِنْ وُجِدَتَا اَلرَّابِعَةَ فِي لِحَافٍ قُتِلَتَا وَ إِذَا أَتَى اَلرَّجُلُ اِمْرَأَتَهُ فَاحْتَمَلَتْ مَاءَهُ فَسَاحَقَتْ بِهِ جَارِيَتَهُ فَحَمَلَتْ رُجِمَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ وَ جُلِدَتِ اَلْجَارِيَةُ وَ أُلْحِقَ اَلْوَلَدُ بِأَبِيهِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5050 - Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Hashim Al-Bajali narrated from Abu Khadijah:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"It is not appropriate for two women to sleep under the same blanket unless there is a barrier between them. If they do so, they should be prohibited from it, and if they are found again after being warned in the same blanket, each of them should be lashed the prescribed punishment.
If they are found a third time under the same blanket, they should be punished with the prescribed punishment,
If they are found a fourth time under the same blanket, they should be executed.
And if a man approaches his wife and she carries his semen and uses it to commit lesbian acts with her maid, resulting in pregnancy, the wife should be stoned, the maid should be lashed, and the child should be attributed to the father."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5051 - Ibrahim bin Hashim narrated from Al-Asbagh bin Al-Asbagh. He said: Muhammad bin Sulayman Al-Misri narrated to me from Marwan bin Muslim from Ubayd bin Zurarah or from Burayd Al-Ijli (the doubt is from Muhammad), who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a slave who commits adultery.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed half the prescribed punishment."
I asked: "What if he does it again?"
Imam (as) replied: "He is to be lashed the same amount."
I asked: "What if he repeats it again?"
Imam (as) said: "He is not to be given more than half the prescribed punishment."
I asked: "Is he ever liable for stoning due to any of his actions?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, he is to be killed on the eighth offense if he does it eight times."
I asked: "What is the difference between him and a free man when their actions are the same?"
Imam (as) said: "Allah (swt), the Blessed and Exalted, had mercy on him by not combining the burden of slavery and the punishment of a free man upon him."
Then Imam (as) said: "It is obligatory upon the leader of the Muslims to pay his price to his master from the zakat share allocated for freeing slaves."
records.arabicText:
5051 - رَوَى إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ اَلْأَصْبَغِ بْنِ اَلْأَصْبَغِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ اَلْمِصْرِيُّ عَنْ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ أَوْ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ اَلشَّكُّ مِنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ:
قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدٌ زَنَى فَقَالَ "يُجْلَدُ نِصْفَ اَلْحَدِّ" قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ عَادَ قَالَ "فَيُضْرَبُ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ" قَالَ قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ عَادَ قَالَ "لاَ يُزَادُ عَلَى نِصْفِ اَلْحَدِّ"
قَالَ قُلْتُ فَهَلْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ اَلرَّجْمُ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ فِعْلِهِ قَالَ "نَعَمْ يُقْتَلُ فِي اَلثَّامِنَةِ إِنْ فَعَلَ ذَلِكَ ثَمَانَ مَرَّاتٍ" قَالَ قُلْتُ فَمَا اَلْفَرْقُ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ اَلْحُرِّ وَ إِنَّمَا فِعْلُهُمَا وَاحِدٌ قَالَ
"إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى رَحِمَهُ أَنْ يَجْمَعَ عَلَيْهِ رِبْقَ اَلرِّقِّ وَ حَدَّ اَلْحُرِّ" قَالَ ثُمَّ قَالَ "وَ عَلَى إِمَامِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ أَنْ يَدْفَعَ ثَمَنَهُ إِلَى مَوْلاَهُ مِنْ سَهْمِ اَلرِّقَابِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5051 - Ibrahim bin Hashim narrated from Al-Asbagh bin Al-Asbagh. He said: Muhammad bin Sulayman Al-Misri narrated to me from Marwan bin Muslim from Ubayd bin Zurarah or from Burayd Al-Ijli (the doubt is from Muhammad), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a slave who commits adultery.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed half the prescribed punishment."
I asked: "What if he does it again?"
Imam (as) replied: "He is to be lashed the same amount."
I asked: "What if he repeats it again?"
Imam (as) said: "He is not to be given more than half the prescribed punishment."
I asked: "Is he ever liable for stoning due to any of his actions?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, he is to be killed on the eighth offense if he does it eight times."
I asked: "What is the difference between him and a free man when their actions are the same?"
Imam (as) said: "Allah (swt), the Blessed and Exalted, had mercy on him by not combining the burden of slavery and the punishment of a free man upon him."
Then Imam (as) said: "It is obligatory upon the leader of the Muslims to pay his price to his master from the zakat share allocated for freeing slaves."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5052 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Harith ibn Al-Ahwal from Burayd Al-ʿIjli from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a slave woman who commits adultery.
Imam (as) said: "She is to be lashed half the prescribed punishment, whether she has a husband or does not have a husband."
records.arabicText: 5052 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ اَلْحَارِثِ بْنِ اَلْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي أَمَةٍ تَزْنِي قَالَ "تُجْلَدُ نِصْفَ اَلْحَدِّ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ أَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا زَوْجٌ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5052 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Harith ibn Al-Ahwal from Burayd Al-ʿIjli from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a slave woman who commits adultery.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "She is to be lashed half the prescribed punishment, whether she has a husband or does not have a husband."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5053 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Riʾab from Zurarah from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"The prescribed punishment for Umm Al-Walad (a slave woman who has borne a child for her master) is the same as that of a slave woman if she has not borne a child."
records.arabicText: 5053 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أُمُّ اَلْوَلَدِ حَدُّهَا حَدُّ اَلْأَمَةِ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا وَلَدٌ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5053 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Riʾab from Zurarah from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The prescribed punishment for Umm Al-Walad (a slave woman who has borne a child for her master) is the same as that of a slave woman if she has not borne a child."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5054 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Nuaym ibn Ibrahim from Mismaʿ Abu Sayyar from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: "The liability of umm Al-walad (a slave woman who has borne a child to her master) concerning the rights of people is upon her master."
Imam (as) also said: "As for the rights of Allah (swt), the Exalted, regarding prescribed punishments, that is upon her own body."
Furthermore, Imam (as) said: "Retribution (qiṣaṣ) applies between her and other slaves, but there is no retribution between a free person and a slave."
records.arabicText: 5054 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ نُعَيْمِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مِسْمَعٍ أَبِي سَيَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أُمُّ اَلْوَلَدِ جِنَايَتُهَا فِي حُقُوقِ اَلنَّاسِ عَلَى سَيِّدِهَا" قَالَ "وَ مَا كَانَ مِنْ حَقِّ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي اَلْحُدُودِ فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ فِي بَدَنِهَا" وَ قَالَ "يُقَاصُّ مِنْهَا لِلْمَمَالِيكِ وَ لاَ قِصَاصَ بَيْنَ اَلْحُرِّ وَ اَلْعَبْدِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5054 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Nuaym ibn Ibrahim from Mismaʿ Abu Sayyar from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"The liability of umm Al-walad (a slave woman who has borne a child to her master) concerning the rights of people is upon her master."
Imam (as) also said: "As for the rights of Allah (swt), the Exalted, regarding prescribed punishments, that is upon her own body."
Furthermore, Imam (as) said: "Retribution (qiṣaṣ) applies between her and other slaves, but there is no retribution between a free person and a slave."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5055 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Bukayr from Anbasah ibn MuṣAb who said: I asked Abu Abdullah (as), "If my bondwoman commits adultery, should I administer the prescribed punishment on her?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, but let it be done in secrecy, for I fear the ruler's authority upon you."
records.arabicText: 5055 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ عَنْبَسَةَ بْنِ مُصْعَبٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنْ زَنَتْ جَارِيَةٌ لِي أَحُدُّهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ وَ لْيَكُنْ ذَلِكَ فِي سِرٍّ فَإِنِّي أَخَافُ عَلَيْكَ اَلسُّلْطَانَ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5055 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Bukayr from Anbasah ibn MuṣAb who said: I asked Abu Abdullah (as),
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"If my bondwoman commits adultery, should I administer the prescribed punishment on her?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, but let it be done in secrecy, for I fear the ruler's authority upon you."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5056 - Ibrahim ibn Hashim narrated from Ṣalih ibn Al-Sindi from Al-Husayn ibn Khalid who reported from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as):
Imam (as) was asked about a man who had a slave woman. The slave woman said to him, "I have paid part of my emancipation contract, so I am free according to that portion."
He replied: "Yes."
After she had paid part of her contract, her master had intercourse with her.
The Imam (as) said: "If he forced her into that act, he will be punished in proportion to what she had paid of her contract, and the punishment will be waived for him in proportion to what remained of her contract. However, if she willingly participated with him, she will share the punishment equally with him and will be lashed the same amount."
records.arabicText: 5056 - وَ رَوَى إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ اَلسِّنْدِيِّ عَنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ لَهُ أَمَةٌ فَقَالَتِ اَلْأَمَةُ لَهُ مَا أَدَّيْتُ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِي فَأَنَا بِهِ حُرَّةٌ عَلَى حِسَابِ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ لَهَا نَعَمْ فَأَدَّتْ بَعْضَ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ جَامَعَهَا مَوْلاَهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ قَالَ "إِنِ اِسْتَكْرَهَهَا عَلَى ذَلِكَ ضُرِبَ مِنَ اَلْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا أَدَّتْ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ دُرِئَ عَنْهُ مِنَ اَلْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا بَقِيَ لَهُ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَابَعَتْهُ كَانَتْ شَرِيكَتَهُ فِي اَلْحَدِّ ضُرِبَتْ مِثْلَ مَا يُضْرَبُ".
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.5056 - Ibrahim ibn Hashim narrated from Ṣalih ibn Al-Sindi from Al-Husayn ibn Khalid who reported from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as):
Imam (as) was asked about a man who had a slave woman.
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The slave woman said to him, "I have paid part of my emancipation contract, so I am free according to that portion."
He replied: "Yes."
After she had paid part of her contract, her master had intercourse with her.
The Imam (as) said: "If he forced her into that act, he will be punished in proportion to what she had paid of her contract, and the punishment will be waived for him in proportion to what remained of her contract. However, if she willingly participated with him, she will share the punishment equally with him and will be lashed the same amount."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5057 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man who took possession of a slave woman from the spoils of war (Al-fay') and had intercourse with her before the division of the spoils.
Imam (as) said: "The slave woman should be appraised and handed over to him for her value, and his share from the spoils should be deducted from that amount. He should be lashed according to the imposed punishment, and punishment will be reduced in proportion to his share in her."
It was then asked: "Why is the slave woman handed over to him for her value instead of to someone else?"
Imam (as) said: "Because he had intercourse with her, and it is feared that she might be pregnant."
records.arabicText: 5057 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَصَابَ جَارِيَةً مِنَ اَلْفَيْءِ فَوَطِئَهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْسَمَ قَالَ "تُقَوَّمُ اَلْجَارِيَةُ وَ تُدْفَعُ إِلَيْهِ بِالْقِيمَةِ وَ يُحَطُّ لَهُ مِنْهَا مَا يُصِيبُهُ مِنْهَا مِنَ اَلْفَيْءِ وَ يُجْلَدُ اَلْحَدَّ وَ يُدْرَأُ عَنْهُ مِنَ اَلْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا كَانَ لَهُ فِيهَا" فَقِيلَ فَكَيْفَ صَارَتِ اَلْجَارِيَةُ تُدْفَعُ إِلَيْهِ بِالْقِيمَةِ دُونَ غَيْرِهَا قَالَ "لِأَنَّهُ وَطِئَهَا وَ لاَ يُؤْمَنُ أَنْ يَكُونَ ثَمَّ حَمْلٌ".

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5058 - Sulayman bin Khalid narrated from Abu Abdullah, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a slave jointly owned by two men, where one of them freed his share. Later, the slave committed an offense that warranted one of Allah's (swt) prescribed punishments.
The Imam (as) said: "If, at the time half of him was freed, he was appraised so that the one who freed him could pay half of his value to the other partner, then half of him is free, and he should receive half the punishment prescribed for a free person and half the punishment prescribed for a slave. However, if he was not appraised, then he remains a slave and should receive the full punishment prescribed for a slave."
records.arabicText: 5058 - وَ رَوَى سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي عَبْدٍ بَيْنَ رَجُلَيْنِ أَعْتَقَ أَحَدُهُمَا نَصِيبَهُ ثُمَّ إِنَّ اَلْعَبْدَ أَتَى حَدّاً مِنْ حُدُودِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ قَالَ "إِنْ كَانَ اَلْعَبْدُ حَيْثُ أُعْتِقَ نِصْفُهُ قُوِّمَ لِيُغَرَّمَ اَلَّذِي أَعْتَقَهُ نِصْفَ قِيمَتِهِ فَنِصْفُهُ حُرٌّ يُضْرَبُ نِصْفَ حَدِّ اَلْحُرِّ وَ يُضْرَبُ نِصْفَ حَدِّ اَلْعَبْدِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ قُوِّمَ فَهُوَ عَبْدٌ يُضْرَبُ حَدَّ اَلْعَبْدِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5058 - Sulayman bin Khalid narrated from Abu Abdullah, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a slave jointly owned by two men, where one of them freed his share. Later, the slave committed an offense that warranted one of Allah's (swt) prescribed punishments.
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Imam (as) said: "If, at the time half of him was freed, he was appraised so that the one who freed him could pay half of his value to the other partner, then half of him is free, and he should receive half the punishment prescribed for a free person and half the punishment prescribed for a slave. However, if he was not appraised, then he remains a slave and should receive the full punishment prescribed for a slave."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5059 - Abbad bin Kathir Al-Basri narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said: "For mukatab slaves (contracted for emancipation), if they commit fornication, they are to be lashed in proportion to what they have paid towards their emancipation with the punishment of a free person, and for the remaining portion, they are lashed with the punishment of a slave."
records.arabicText: 5059 - وَ رَوَى عَبَّادُ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ اَلْبَصْرِيُّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "فِي اَلْمُكَاتَبَيْنِ إِذَا فَجَرَا يُضْرَبَانِ مِنَ اَلْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا أَدَّيَا مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهِمَا حَدَّ اَلْحُرِّ وَ يُضْرَبَانِ اَلْبَاقِيَ حَدَّ اَلْمَمْلُوكِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5059 - Abbad bin Kathir Al-Basri narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "For mukatab slaves (contracted for emancipation), if they commit fornication, they are to be lashed in proportion to what they have paid towards their emancipation with the punishment of a free person, and for the remaining portion, they are lashed with the punishment of a slave."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Intercourse with an Animal
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5060 - Al-Hasan bin Mahbub narrated from Ishaq bin Jarir from Sadeer from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) was asked about a man who engages in intercourse with an animal.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed with a punishment less than the prescribed limit and must compensate the owner for the value of the animal because he has corrupted it for him.
If it is an animal whose meat is consumed, it must be slaughtered, burned, and buried.
If it is an animal that is ridden, he must pay its value, be lashed with a punishment less than the prescribed limit, and take it out of the city where he committed the act to another land where it is not known, and sell it there so that he is not disgraced by it."
records.arabicText: 5060 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يَأْتِي اَلْبَهِيمَةَ قَالَ "يُجْلَدُ دُونَ اَلْحَدِّ وَ يُغْرَمُ قِيمَةَ اَلْبَهِيمَةِ لِصَاحِبِهَا لِأَنَّهُ أَفْسَدَهَا عَلَيْهِ وَ تُذْبَحُ وَ تُحْرَقُ وَ تُدْفَنُ إِنْ كَانَ مِمَّا يُؤْكَلُ لَحْمُهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ مِمَّا يُرْكَبُ ظَهْرُهُ أُغْرِمَ قِيمَتَهَا وَ جُلِدَ دُونَ اَلْحَدِّ وَ أَخْرَجَهَا مِنَ اَلْمَدِينَةِ اَلَّتِي فَعَلَ ذَلِكَ بِهَا إِلَى بِلاَدٍ أُخْرَى حَيْثُ لاَ تُعْرَفُ فَيَبِيعُهَا فِيهَا كَيْ لاَ يُعَيَّرَ بِهَا".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5060 - Al-Hasan bin Mahbub narrated from Ishaq bin Jarir from Sadeer from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) was asked about a man who engages in intercourse with an animal.
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed with a punishment less than the prescribed limit and must compensate the owner for the value of the animal because he has corrupted it for him.
If it is an animal whose meat is consumed, it must be slaughtered, burned, and buried.
If it is an animal that is ridden, he must pay its value, be lashed with a punishment less than the prescribed limit, and take it out of the city where he committed the act to another land where it is not known, and sell it there so that he is not disgraced by it."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for a Procurer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5061 - Ibrahim bin Hashim narrated from Salih bin Al-Sindi from Muhammad bin Sulayman Al-Basri from Abdullah bin Sinan.
He said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "Inform me about the qawwad (panderer), what is his prescribed punishment?"
The Imam (as) replied: "There is no hadd (fixed legal punishment) on the qawwad. is he not merely receiving payment for facilitating?"
I said: "May I be your ransom, but he is bringing together a man and a woman unlawfully."
Imam (as) said: "That is the one who arranges unlawful meetings between a man and a woman."
I said: "Yes, that is the case, may I be your ransom."
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed three-quarters of the punishment of a fornicator - seventy-five lashes - and he is to be exiled from the city in which he resides."
records.arabicText: 5061 - رَوَى إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ اَلسِّنْدِيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ اَلْبَصْرِيِّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع أَخْبِرْنِي عَنِ اَلْقَوَّادِ مَا حَدُّهُ قَالَ "لاَ حَدَّ عَلَى اَلْقَوَّادِ أَ لَيْسَ إِنَّمَا يُعْطَى اَلْأَجْرَ عَلَى أَنْ يَقُودَ" قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنَّمَا يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ اَلذَّكَرِ وَ اَلْأُنْثَى حَرَاماً قَالَ "ذَاكَ اَلْمُؤَلِّفُ بَيْنَ اَلذَّكَرِ وَ اَلْأُنْثَى حَرَاماً" فَقُلْتُ هُوَ ذَاكَ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَالَ "يُضْرَبُ ثَلاَثَةَ أَرْبَاعِ حَدِّ اَلزَّانِي خَمْسَةً وَ سَبْعِينَ سَوْطاً وَ يُنْفَى مِنَ اَلْمِصْرِ اَلَّذِي هُوَ فِيهِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5061 - Ibrahim bin Hashim narrated from Salih bin Al-Sindi from Muhammad bin Sulayman Al-Basri from Abdullah bin Sinan.
records.thaqalaynMatn:
He said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "Inform me about the qawwad (panderer), what is his prescribed punishment?"
The Imam (as) replied: "There is no hadd (fixed legal punishment) on the qawwad. is he not merely receiving payment for facilitating?"
I said: "May I be your ransom, but he is bringing together a man and a woman unlawfully."
Imam (as) said: "That is the one who arranges unlawful meetings between a man and a woman."
I said: "Yes, that is the case, may I be your ransom."
Imam (as) said: "He is to be lashed three-quarters of the punishment of a fornicator - seventy-five lashes - and he is to be exiled from the city in which he resides."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for a Procurer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5062 - In a narration: The Messenger of Allah (swt) cursed Al-wasilah and Al-muṭasilah.
records.arabicText: 5062 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: لَعَنَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلْوَاصِلَةَ وَ اَلْمُوتَصِلَةَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5062 - In a narration:
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Messenger of Allah (swt) cursed Al-wasilah and Al-muṭasilah.

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5063 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a man who accuses his wife (of adultery).
Imam (as) said: "He is to be flogged."
I asked: "What if she pardons him?"
Imam (as) said: "No, and no honor (for him)."
records.arabicText: 5063 - رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلَّذِي يَقْذِفُ اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَالَ "يُجْلَدُ" قُلْتُ أَ رَأَيْتَ إِنْ عَفَتْ عَنْهُ قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ كَرَامَةَ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5063 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a man who accuses his wife (of adultery).
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) said: "He is to be flogged."
I asked: "What if she pardons him?"
Imam (as) said: "No, and no honor (for him)."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5064 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Hammad ibn Ziyad from Sulayman ibn Khalid from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who said to his wife after consummating the marriage, "I did not find you a virgin"
Imam (as) said: "There is no legal punishment upon him."
records.arabicText: 5064 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ قَالَ لاِمْرَأَتِهِ بَعْدَ مَا دَخَلَتْ عَلَيْهِ لَمْ أَجِدْكِ عَذْرَاءَ قَالَ "لاَ حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5064 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Hammad ibn Ziyad from Sulayman ibn Khalid from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who said to his wife after consummating the marriage, "I did not find you a virgin"
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "There is no legal punishment upon him."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5065 - In another narration, Imam (as) said: "Indeed, the hymen may be lost without intercourse; it can be lost due to injury, stumbling, or falling."
records.arabicText: 5065 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: "إِنَّ اَلْعُذْرَةَ قَدْ تَسْقُطُ مِنْ غَيْرِ جِمَاعٍ قَدْ تَذْهَبُ بِالنَّكْبَةِ وَ اَلْعَثْرَةِ وَ اَلسَّقْطَةِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5065 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Indeed, the hymen may be lost without intercourse; it can be lost due to injury, stumbling, or falling."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5066 - In the narration of Wahb ibn Wahb from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as):
"Indeed, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) would not administer the legal punishment for insinuation unless it was a clear and explicit accusation, such as saying, 'O' adulterer,' or 'O' son of an adulteress,' or 'You are not your father's son.'"
records.arabicText: 5066 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ وَهْبِ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَحُدُّ فِي اَلتَّعْرِيضِ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ بِالْفِرْيَةِ اَلْمُصَرَّحَةِ مِثْلِ يَا زَانِ وَ يَا اِبْنَ اَلزَّانِيَةِ أَوْ لَسْتَ لِأَبِيكَ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5066 - In the narration of Wahb ibn Wahb from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as):
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Indeed, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) would not administer the legal punishment for insinuation unless it was a clear and explicit accusation, such as saying, 'O' adulterer,' or 'O' son of an adulteress,' or 'You are not your father's son.'"

records.chapter: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5067 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abbad ibn Suhayb who said: Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a Christian who accused a Muslim by saying to him, "O' adulterer."
Imam (as) said: "He is to be flogged eighty lashes for violating the right of the Muslim and eighty lashes minus one for violating the sanctity of Islam. His head is to be shaved, and he is to be paraded among the people of his religion so that others may be deterred."
records.arabicText: 5067 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ صُهَيْبٍ قَالَ: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ نَصْرَانِيٍّ قَذَفَ مُسْلِماً فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا زَانِ قَالَ "يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ جَلْدَةً لِحَقِّ اَلْمُسْلِمِ وَ ثَمَانِينَ جَلْدَةً إِلاَّ سَوْطاً لِحُرْمَةِ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ وَ يُحْلَقُ رَأْسُهُ وَ يُطَافُ بِهِ فِي أَهْلِ دِينِهِ لِكَيْ يُنَكَّلَ غَيْرُهُ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.5067 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abbad ibn Suhayb who said: Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a Christian who accused a Muslim by saying to him, "O' adulterer."
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He is to be flogged eighty lashes for violating the right of the Muslim and eighty lashes minus one for violating the sanctity of Islam. His head is to be shaved, and he is to be paraded among the people of his religion so that others may be deterred."
